issues.title: Add support for custom WebClient.Builder in org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi

comments.body: This is a duplicate of https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/609 which was fixed recently. See commit https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/commit/377b5ffa61427ce94f49793b00f4617edfcc59bc

> This is a duplicate of #609 which was fixed recently. See commit [377b5ff](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/commit/377b5ffa61427ce94f49793b00f4617edfcc59bc)

This problem seems to continue to persist even in the recent release. It doesn't expect the rest-client builder to be nullable and as such operates on the assumption that both configurations and builders are available.
Thanks for the feedback @Adakole2020   Will investigate.
